pi_items.verified_value: Normalized 0-1 coordinates (standard in graphics APIs). Target x=0.5, y=0.5, w=0.5, h=0.5 creates bottom-right quadrant (starts at image center, extends to right and bottom edges)

pi_items.verified_value: Synthetic test environment for AI agent benchmarking
pi_items.source: Code analysis: env.json shows localhost:7001 base URL (task_utils.sh line 4), hardcoded test credentials (admin/Admin1234!), created as Ubuntu Gnome VMS environment for testing agent tasks

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a specialized surveillance layout named 'Lobby POS Monitor' in a Nx Witness VMS system running on localhost:7001. The layout must contain two views of the 'Lobby Camera': one showing the full view with default zoom, and a second showing a fixed digital zoom on the bottom-right quadrant (x=0.5, y=0.5, width=0.5, height=0.5) with a tolerance of 0.05 for coordinate matching. This is a synthetic test environment designed for AI agent benchmarking with hardcoded test credentials (admin/Admin1234!). The zoom coordinates use normalized 0-1 values where (0.5, 0.5) represents the image center, and the target rectangle extends to the right and bottom edges of the image.
